case_title: LOPEZ, ANASTACIO VS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ANASTACIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC THE MATTER WAS ALREADY LITIGATED IN SMALL CLAIMS NO.767750 WITH JUDGMENT FOR DEFT IN THAT ACTION.
